auth.heroBody: POS, QR ordering, printers, settings, and dashboard in one focused workspace.

customerDisplay.thanks: Thank you for dining with us.

dashboard.paretoHint: Products sorted by selected metric with cumulative share
dashboard.subtitle: Today’s operating pulse
dashboard.tipOne: Use the POS pages for active orders, checkout, printer routing, and kitchen flow.
dashboard.tipTwo: All management pages are generated from the rebuilt service contract.
dashboard.title: Dashboard

empty.adjustSearch: Create the first record or adjust your search.
empty.title: No data

notFound.message: We can't find the page you were looking for.
notFound.title: Page not found

newOrder.title: New order received
newOrder.description: Table 4 placed an order for 3 items.

lowStock.title: Low stock alert
lowStock.description: Iced latte syrup is running low.

welcome.title: Welcome to Yummy Go
welcome.description: Explore the dashboard to get started.

pos.discountAmountHelp: Enter a discount amount greater than 0.
pos.discountDialogDescription: Choose a discount type and value.
pos.editNoteDescription: Update or clear the item note.
pos.publicQrDescription: Scan this QR code to open the menu for {{table}}.
pos.customerDisplayBrowserModeDescription: This browser cannot access connected screen details. Open the customer display in a new window and move it manually if needed.
pos.customerDisplayBrowserScreensDescription: Chrome or Edge can detect connected screens after permission is granted. Select the screen for the customer display.
pos.customerDisplayNoScreensDescription: Connect a display or refresh the screen list.
pos.customerDisplayNoSecondaryDescription: If two monitors are connected, set Windows Display Settings to Extend these displays instead of Duplicate/Mirror, then refresh screens.
pos.customerDisplayPickerDescription: Choose the monitor where the customer display should appear.
pos.customerDisplayPopupBlocked: The customer display window was blocked. Allow popups for this site and try again.
pos.tableQrDescription: Create and print the QR menu for {{table}}.
pos.moveTableDescription: Move this order to an empty table.
pos.moveTableRule: Can move only to an empty table. Tables already in use or with an order are not available.
pos.joinTablesDescription: Merge other occupied tables into this table.
pos.joinTablesRule: Can join only tables that are in use or already have an order. Empty tables are not available.
pos.publicLoadingDescription: Please wait while we load the latest table and menu details.
pos.qrDisabledDescription: This table QR is not active. Please ask staff for help.
pos.confirmAllPrinting: Printing kitchen tickets and updating status.
pos.confirmSplitPaymentDescription: Create a split bill for {{count}} selected items totaling {{amount}}, then open payment?
pos.splitPaymentMissingOrder: Split bill was created, but no payable order was returned.
pos.splitPaymentNoEligibleItems: No payable history items are available to split.
pos.splitPaymentSelectRequired: Select at least one payable item to split.
pos.splitPaymentSelectHint: Select order history items to split into a separate bill.
pos.exchangeRateUnavailable: No exchange rates available. LAK only.
pos.invoicePrintFallback: Printer agent unavailable. Print window opened.
pos.invoicePrintMissingJob: No invoice print job was returned.
pos.invoicePrintPopupBlocked: Allow popups to open the print window.
pos.cashPaymentHint: Enter received cash or choose a quick amount.
pos.paymentMissingOrder: No order is available for payment.
pos.paymentCashInsufficient: Cash received is less than the amount due.
pos.paymentTransferInsufficient: Transfer received is less than the amount due.
pos.paymentMixedRequired: Enter both cash and transfer amounts.
pos.paymentMixedInsufficient: Cash and transfer total is less than the amount due.
pos.paymentCustomerHint: A customer is required for every payment.
pos.transferExactHint: Transfer pays the full bill by default. Edit only when the received transfer is different.
pos.transferPaymentHint: Let the customer scan the branch QR, then confirm the transfer.
pos.noBranchQr: No branch QR image is available.
pos.searchSheetDescription: Search your menu or choose a recent search.
pos.subtitleTables: Open a table to manage order, payment, split bill, and printing.
pos.title: Order

storePermissions.assignmentHint: Tick the submenus this store and role should be allowed to see.
storePermissions.description: Choose a store and role, then assign the visible submenu list.
storePermissions.emptyTreeDescription: Select a store and role to load menu permissions.
storePermissions.noOptionsDescription: The permission API did not return selectable stores or roles.
storePermissions.noSubmenus: No submenus in this main menu
storePermissions.roleHint: Roles are loaded from the permission role endpoint.
storePermissions.storeHint: Stores are loaded with active PLC access.
storePermissions.title: Store menu permissions

permissionMenu.badgeHint: Show badge uses value 1. Do not show badge uses value 2.
permissionMenu.deleteMainDescription: Delete {{title}} and its related submenu records?
permissionMenu.description: Manage the menu records returned by the menu permission service.
permissionMenu.emptyDescription: Create a main menu before adding submenu records.
permissionMenu.iconHint: Choose the icon shown in the navigation.
permissionMenu.iconDialogDescription: Pick the icon that will appear in the navigation menu.
permissionMenu.mainEditDescription: Update this top-level menu record using the create API.
permissionMenu.mainFormDescription: Create a top-level menu record for the permission service.
permissionMenu.menuStatusHint: Show dropdown uses value 1. Do not show dropdown uses value 2.
permissionMenu.manualPathPlaceholder: Type a path, for example /, sale, or /saleorder
permissionMenu.pathHint: Choose a route suggestion or type a path manually.
permissionMenu.subEditDescription: Update this submenu under {{title}} using the create API.
permissionMenu.title: Permission management menu

printer.agentHint: Agent details are filled from the local agent when available. You can still edit them.
printer.laoFontNoticeDescription: If Lao text prints incorrectly or becomes garbled, download and install Lao Script 8.
printer.categoriesHint: Select menu categories routed to this printer.
printer.connectionHint: WiFi is selected by default. Switch to USB to search local printers from the agent.
printer.deviceSearchEmpty: No device search has been run yet.
printer.formHint: Set the printer connection, roles, categories, and local agent details.
printer.noPrintersDescription: Add a printer or search local devices.
printer.rolesHint: Select print jobs this printer should handle.
printer.searchUsbHint: Search USB first, then choose one discovered device.
printer.subtitle: Printer management
printer.testBeforeSave: Print a test slip before saving so you can confirm the selected USB printer.
printer.title: Printers
printer.usbSearchPending: USB printers will appear here after the agent search finishes.

product.branchRequired: A branch must be selected first

choiceHints.color: Use a color tile when there is no product photo.
choiceHints.foodSet: A bundled menu item with one set price.
choiceHints.general: A normal menu item with size-based prices.
choiceHints.hasTopping: Let staff choose extras and set extra prices.
choiceHints.image: Use an uploaded photo for this product.

product.createOrSearch: Create a product or change the search.

detailModeHints.foodSet: Use the set price above. Details keep size, cost, and stock.
detailModeHints.general: Each size has its own cost, selling price, and stock behavior.
detailModeHints.promotion: Each size can carry buy/free rules and promotion dates.

product.formDescription: Start with the product type, then fill only the sections that apply.

sections.detailsHint: Provide size and pricing. Structure depends on product type.
sections.imageHint: Choose an image or a color to represent the product.

stockBulk.label: Stock for all sizes
stockBulk.noDeductAll: Do not cut stock for all sizes

product.subtitle: Products are powered by the product service contract.
product.title: Products

profile.title: Edit profile
profile.subtitle: Update your account details and password.

sections.avatarHint: Upload an image to personalize your account.
sections.passwordHint: Use a strong password you don't reuse elsewhere.

report.adjustFilters: Adjust the date range or report type.
report.branchRequired: Your login does not include a branch.

report.dailySalesDescription: Review bill summaries and item-level sales for the selected day range.

salesList.branchRequired: Your login does not include a branch.
salesList.branchRequiredDescription: Choose a branch account before opening the sales list.
salesList.cancelDescription: Cancel invoice {{invoice}}. This action will be recorded with your reason.
salesList.cancelReasonHelp: Write a clear reason for the bill cancellation.
salesList.noBillsDescription: There are no cancelable bills for this filter.
salesList.noItemsDescription: This bill does not include item detail.
salesList.reprintReceiptFallback: Printer agent unavailable. Print window opened.
salesList.reprintReceiptPopupBlocked: Allow popups to open the print window.
salesList.selectBillHint: Select a bill from the list to view details.

settings.filterDescription: Adjust rows per page and sorting.
settings.categoryFormHint: Select a food group and use Lao and English names.
settings.branchRequired: Your login does not include a branch.
settings.branchFromLogin: This branch comes from your login and cannot be changed here.
settings.createBranchFirst: Create a branch before adding users.
settings.createCurrencyFirst: Create a currency before adding exchange rates.
settings.createRoleFirst: Create a role before adding users.
settings.createZoneFirst: Create a zone before adding tables.
settings.customerFormHint: Enter the customer name, phone number, and address.
settings.exchangeFormHint: Select a currency and set the exchange rate.
settings.locationFormHint: Use Lao and English names so the API can return the right language.
settings.tryDifferentFlagSearch: Try a different country or code.
settings.storeRequired: Your login does not include a store.
settings.tableFormHint: Select a zone and set the table details.
settings.tableChargeHint: Enable this when the table should include the customer table service fee.
settings.tableChargeTooltip: Edit the service charge rate in Branch settings.
settings.passwordRequired: Password is required for new users.
settings.profileImageHint: Upload a profile image. Leave it empty to keep the current image.
